title: bug affecting simple function to pick an item at random
description:
### What happens?

My bug, my apologies.
key_bug_features: selecting an out-of-bounds index from an array
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_array (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, values ARRAY<INTEGER>);
SELECT values[0] FROM test_array WHERE id = 1;
SELECT values[1] FROM test_array WHERE id = 1;
SELECT values[3] FROM test_array WHERE id = 1;
